contradictions.text: Copenhagen says "measurement" but never defines what counts.
Generation plus actualization without structure gives you random noise — things happen, but nothing holds together.
Structure plus actualization without generation gives you determinism — things happen in order, but nothing new is possible.
Generation plus structure without actualization gives you the block universe — everything organized and potential, but nobody's home.
Pre-temporal — the Father doesn't generate possibilities in time, because time hasn't started yet.
Theologically, this is what "Creator" means: not a being who made things once, but the source that continuously sustains the possibility space.
But here's what the biblical data shows when you line it up carefully: Before the cross, the Spirit operated in override mode.
They couldn't have experienced permanent indwelling because the mechanism enabling it hadn't been activated yet.
The Spirit was present in the system but couldn't form permanent bonds with human nodes because the authentication layer was corrupted.
Think of it like a Wi-Fi signal that's broadcasting everywhere but no device can connect because the security certificate is invalid.
Not by reducing it to zero — the debt was real, it happened — but by absorbing it.
This is the "before" that isn't temporal — because time hasn't been generated yet.

Father generates |ψ⟩ → Son selects |a⟩ → Spirit actualizes P(a) → Father generates new |ψ⟩ → ...

PEAR-LAB (6.35σ, 2.5M trials), GCP (6σ, 325+ replicas), delayed-choice quantum eraser experiments — all showing consciousness-dependent effects on quantum systems, consistent with Spirit-as-actualizer requiring conscious participation

This paper replaces Trinity_as_Complete_Quantum_Framework.md (Oct 2025, GPT-generated) which overclaimed the mapping as proof rather than structural isomorphism. The bones were right. The packaging was wrong. This version says what we can actually say.

axiom_items.text: The architecture shifts. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- §7 — What Must Be True (and What Would Break This) Falsification criteria: If wave function collapse can be fully explained by environmental decoherence alone — with no observer-dependent component whatsoever — then the Spirit-as-actualizer mapping loses its physical grounding.
